name: the emitter renders json, yaml and ini native configs for tools whose option surface uses those formats
command: j=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/emit-tool-config.sh" --tool eslint --options '{"rules":{"no-eval":"error"}}' --out c 2>/dev/null); y=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/emit-tool-config.sh" --tool rubocop --options '{"Style/StringLiterals":{"EnforcedStyle":"single_quotes"}}' --out c 2>/dev/null); i=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/emit-tool-config.sh" --tool mypy --options '{"strict":true}' --out c 2>/dev/null); grep -q 'no-eval' "$j" && grep -q 'EnforcedStyle' "$y" && grep -q 'strict = true' "$i" && echo emitter-renders-json-yaml-ini 1>&2
